title: jacquemontia sandwicensis
intro: Jacquemontia sandwicensis, also known as the Hawaiian morning glory or kauna'oa, is a flowering vine native to Hawaii and other Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jacquemontia sandwicensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
